title: deutzia mollis
intro: Deutzia mollis, also known as the flowering shrub, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern Asia, characterized by its clusters of white, fragrant flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Deutzia mollis include its ability to help alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments for centuries.
